briefdescription.para: Perform a scheduler operation on a specified domain.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the domain on which the scheduler operation is to be performed.
A pointer to a struct xen_domctl_scheduler_op object that defines the specific scheduler operation to be performed.

briefdescription.para: Pauses a domain in the Xen hypervisor.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the domain to be paused.

briefdescription.para: Unpauses a domain in the Xen hypervisor.

parameterdescription.para: The domain ID of the domain to be unpaused.

briefdescription.para: Resumes a domain.

detaileddescription.para: This function resumes the execution of a domain in the shutdown state.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the domain to be resumed.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the virtual CPU context for a specific domain and virtual CPU.

detaileddescription.para: This function resumes the execution of a domain in the shutdown state.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the virtual CPU.
Pointer to the vcpu_guest_context_t structure where the virtual CPU context will be stored.

briefdescription.para: Sets the virtual CPU context for a specified domain and virtual CPU.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the virtual CPU.
Pointer to the virtual CPU guest context structure.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves information about a Xen domain.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the Xen domain to retrieve information for.
Pointer to the structure where the retrieved domain information will be stored.

briefdescription.para: Gets the paging mempool size for a specified domain.

parameterdescription.para: pointer where to store size of the paging mempool.

briefdescription.para: Sets the paging mempool size for a specified domain.

parameterdescription.para: The size of the paging mempool in bytes.

briefdescription.para: Sets the maximum memory for a specified domain.

parameterdescription.para: The domain ID of the domain to set the maximum memory for.
The maximum memory (in kilobytes) to set for the domain.

briefdescription.para: Sets the address size for a specified domain.

parameterdescription.para: The address size to be set.

memberdef.argsstring: (int domid, uint64_t first_mfn, uint64_t nr_mfns, uint8_t allow_access)
memberdef.name: xen_domctl_iomem_permission

briefdescription.para: Set IOMEM permission for a domain.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the domain for which IOMEM permission is being set.
The starting machine frame number of the memory range.
The number of MFNs in the memory range.
Flag indicating whether to allow or deny access to the specified memory range. A non-zero value allows access, while a zero value denies access.

memberdef.argsstring: (int domid, uint64_t first_gfn, uint64_t first_mfn, uint64_t nr_mfns, uint32_t add_mapping)
memberdef.name: xen_domctl_memory_mapping

briefdescription.para: Maps a range of machine memory to a range of guest memory.

parameterdescription.para: The domain ID of the target domain.
The first guest frame number to map.
The first machine frame number to map.
The number of machine frames to map.
Flag indicating whether to add or remove the mapping.

briefdescription.para: Assign a device to a guest.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the domain to which the device is to be assigned.
The path of the device tree device to be assigned.

briefdescription.para: Deassign a device from a guest domain.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the domain from which the device should be deassigned.
The path of the device tree device to be deassigned.

memberdef.argsstring: (int domid, uint32_t machine_irq, uint8_t irq_type, uint8_t bus, uint8_t device, uint8_t intx, uint8_t isa_irq, uint16_t spi)
memberdef.name: xen_domctl_bind_pt_irq

briefdescription.para: Binds a physical IRQ to a specified domain.

detaileddescription.para: Only supports SPI IRQs for now.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the domain to bind the IRQ to.
The machine IRQ number to bind.
The type of IRQ to bind (PT_IRQ_TYPE_SPI).
The PCI bus number of the device generating the IRQ. (optional)
The PCI device number generating the IRQ. (optional)
The PCI INTx line number of the device generating the IRQ. (optional)
The ISA IRQ number to bind. (optional)
The shared peripheral interrupt (SPI) number to bind. (optional)

briefdescription.para: Set the maximum number of vCPUs for a domain.

detaileddescription.para: The parameter passed to XEN_DOMCTL_max_vcpus must match the value passed to XEN_DOMCTL_createdomain. This hypercall is in the process of being removed (once the failure paths in domain_create() have been improved), but is still required in the short term to allocate the vcpus themselves.

parameterdescription.para: Maximum number of vCPUs to set.

briefdescription.para: Creates a new domain with the specified domain ID and configuration.

detaileddescription.para: NB. domid is an IN/OUT parameter for this operation. If it is specified as an invalid value (0 or >= DOMID_FIRST_RESERVED), an id is auto-allocated and returned.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to domain ID of the new domain.
Pointer to a structure containing the configuration for the new domain.

briefdescription.para: Clean and invalidate caches associated with given region of guest memory.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the domain for which the cache needs to be flushed.
A pointer to the xen_domctl_cacheflush structure that contains the cache flush parameters.

briefdescription.para: Destroys a Xen domain.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the domain to be destroyed.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves information about a specific virtual CPU (vCPU) in a Xen domain.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to a structure to store the vCPU information.

briefdescription.para: Xen Domain Control Interface.
